name: Cowry Asset Management Limited
description: Investment banking firm incorporated on February 22, 2005. Licensed by the Nigerian Securities & Exchange Commission as an issuing house, financial adviser, underwriter and venture capital manager. Has subsidiaries in Consulting, Securities.

# Turning Ambition into Achievement.
Transforming dreams into reality through the power of wealth creation.
At Cowry, we believe wealth is more than money — it’s the power to build, to grow, and to dream beyond limits. From personal finance to institutional investments, we help individuals, businesses, and communities across Africa unlock prosperity and achieve lasting success.
[Get Started](https://www.cowryasset.com/Home/AccountType)
## A Financial Supermarket
Empowering individuals, corporates, and governments through capital market solutions.
[Explore Subsidiaries](https://www.cowryasset.com/Subsidiaries)
## Backed by Research. Driven by Innovation.
Delivering high-quality financial solutions across Africa.
[Learn More](https://www.cowryasset.com/About)

## Our Subsidiaries
We offer a comprehensive portfolio management, investment advisory, and subsidiary services tailored to meet your financial needs.
![Investment Banking](https://www.cowryasset.com/images/icons/investment-banking.png)
#### Investment Banking
Structuring complex transactions, raising capital, and executing mergers and acquisitions.
[Read More](https://www.cowryasset.com/InvestmentBanking)

#### Securities Trading
Access to equities, bonds, and market insights for informed trading decisions.

Tailored investment portfolios, mutual funds, and retirement planning solutions.
[Read More](https://www.cowryasset.com/AssetManagement)

Efficiently managed mutual, fixed income, and money market funds for optimal returns.
[Read More](https://www.cowryasset.com/)

#### Savings and Loans
Accessible savings plans and structured loan products tailored to your financial goals.
[Read More](https://www.cowryasset.com/)
![Consulting](https://www.cowryasset.com/images/icons/consulting.png)
#### Consulting
Expert advice on financial strategy, compliance, and corporate structuring.
[Read More](https://www.cowryasset.com/)
![Market Analysis](https://www.cowryasset.com/images/icons/market-analysis.png)
#### Market Analysis
In-depth market research, performance tracking, and insightful financial reporting.
[Read More](https://www.cowryasset.com/SecuritiesTrading/Research)

## WHO WE ARE
Cowry Asset Management offers stakeholders exceptional wealth-creating financial subsidiaries geared towards financial advisory, discretionary portfolio management, and more.
Cowry Asset Management is **registered and regulated** by the **Securities and Exchange Commission, Nigeria**.
[Learn more](https://www.cowryasset.com/About)
## Open an Account with Us Today
Choose between **Investment** and **Stockbroking** accounts to begin your journey.
[Get Started](https://www.cowryasset.com/Home/AccountType)
